name: backstage-plugin-frontend-system-migration
description: Migrates Backstage plugins from the legacy architecture to the new frontend system using the extension-based model.

scripts.test: yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/inventory.ts ./tests/inventory && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/route-refs && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/plugin-shell && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/apis && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/unified.ts ./tests/pages-hooks && yarn exec codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
scripts.test:inventory: yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/inventory.ts ./tests/inventory
scripts.validate: yarn exec codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
